CustomField.description: Total MR Balance considering all outstanding receipts and payments
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
"MR Balance corrected for non-paid MR invoices or claims:
Starting MR Balance + Accumulated MR (During Lease) - MR Payout (During Lease) + Outstanding Invoices - Outstanding Payouts"
CustomField.label: Z_Unused2106 Balance - Accounting
